text.title: Ai In Project Management — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the org have DORA baseline + PMBOK 8 alignment intent + AI-decision policy draft?

branch.when: dora_baseline_present == true AND pmbok8_alignment == true AND policy_draft_present == true
branch.conclusion: Adopt as the operating frame: log every AI-assisted decision with model + input hash + reviewer.
Block. Establish baseline first; AI optimisation needs comparison.
Block. Author the policy draft; AI-assisted decisions without traceability fail audit.
